name: log_manager
description: Central logging system for all tool invocations, LLM decisions, agent switches, and errors. Writes structured JSONL entries to the master log (logs/master.jsonl) and per-session log files (logs/sessions/<session_id>.jsonl). Also provides query and summary capabilities for reviewing session activity. This tool supports the self-healing process by producing AI-parseable logs of all agent and tool work.

session_id.description: Session identifier (YYYYMMDD_HHmmss). Required for all logging actions. Optional for 'query' (defaults to master log).

data.description: Action-specific payload. For 'log_tool': {tool, params, result, duration_ms?}. For 'log_decision': {agent, decision, reasoning?, context?}. For 'log_agent_switch': {from, to, reason}. For 'log_error': {source, error, traceback?}. For 'log_event': {event_type, ...extra_fields}.

params.description: Parameters passed to the tool (for log_tool).

result.description: Tool result or status summary (for log_tool).

agent.description: Agent ID making the decision (for log_decision).

decision.description: The decision or output summary (for log_decision).

context.description: Additional context for the decision (for log_decision).

from.description: Agent ID being switched away from (for log_agent_switch).

to.description: Agent ID being switched to (for log_agent_switch).

reason.description: Reason for the agent switch (for log_agent_switch).

source.description: Source module or agent where the error occurred (for log_error).

type_filter.description: Filter log entries by type when querying: tool_invocation, llm_decision, agent_switch, error.

last_n.description: Number of most-recent log entries to return (default: 50).
